title: Claude Code — Bedrock Cost & Usage
description: Token usage and estimated Bedrock cost from Claude Code OTel metrics. Cost is computed from token counts using Bedrock pricing rates, not from claude_code_cost_usage (which uses Anthropic direct API rates).

panels.title: Estimated Bedrock Cost (Total)
panels.description: Total estimated cost using Bedrock on-demand pricing. Computed from token counts, not from claude_code_cost_usage.

targets.expr:
(
  sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model=~"$model", user_id=~"$user_id", type="input"}[$__range])) by (model) / 1e6
  * on(model) group_left label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(
    vector(0),
    "model", "claude-opus-4-6", "", ""),
    "__name__", "", "", ""),
    "__name__", "", "", ""),
    "__name__", "", "", ""),
    "__name__", "", "", "")
  * 0 + on() group_left
  (
    sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-opus-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="input"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 5
    or vector(0)
  )
  +
  (
    sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-opus-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="output"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 25
    or vector(0)
  )
  +
  (
    sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-opus-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheRead"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 0.5
    or vector(0)
  )
  +
  (
    sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-opus-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheCreation"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 6.25
    or vector(0)
  )
  +
  (
    sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-sonnet-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="input"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 3
    or vector(0)
  )
  +
  (
    sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-sonnet-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="output"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 15
    or vector(0)
  )
  +
  (
    sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-sonnet-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheRead"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 0.3
    or vector(0)
  )
  +
  (
    sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-sonnet-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheCreation"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 3.75
    or vector(0)
  )
  +
  (
    sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", user_id=~"$user_id", type="input"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 1
    or vector(0)
  )
  +
  (
    sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", user_id=~"$user_id", type="output"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 5
    or vector(0)
  )
  +
  (
    sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheRead"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 0.1
    or vector(0)
  )
  +
  (
    sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheCreation"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 1.25
    or vector(0)
  )
) * $bedrock_region_multiplier

panels.title: Claude Code Cost vs Bedrock Estimate
panels.description: Compares claude_code_cost_usage (Anthropic direct API rates) against estimated Bedrock cost (computed from token counts). Any gap indicates pricing model differences.

panels.title: Bedrock Cost Over Time by Model
panels.description: Estimated Bedrock cost rate ($/hr) computed from token usage rates and Bedrock pricing.

targets.expr:
(
  sum(rate(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-opus-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="input"}[5m])) / 1e6 * 5 +
  sum(rate(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-opus-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="output"}[5m])) / 1e6 * 25 +
  (sum(rate(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-opus-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheRead"}[5m])) / 1e6 * 0.5 or vector(0)) +
  (sum(rate(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-opus-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheCreation"}[5m])) / 1e6 * 6.25 or vector(0))
) * 3600 * $bedrock_region_multiplier

(
  sum(rate(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-sonnet-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="input"}[5m])) / 1e6 * 3 +
  sum(rate(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-sonnet-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="output"}[5m])) / 1e6 * 15 +
  (sum(rate(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-sonnet-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheRead"}[5m])) / 1e6 * 0.3 or vector(0)) +
  (sum(rate(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-sonnet-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheCreation"}[5m])) / 1e6 * 3.75 or vector(0))
) * 3600 * $bedrock_region_multiplier

(
  sum(rate(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", user_id=~"$user_id", type="input"}[5m])) / 1e6 * 1 +
  sum(rate(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", user_id=~"$user_id", type="output"}[5m])) / 1e6 * 5 +
  (sum(rate(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheRead"}[5m])) / 1e6 * 0.1 or vector(0)) +
  (sum(rate(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheCreation"}[5m])) / 1e6 * 1.25 or vector(0))
) * 3600 * $bedrock_region_multiplier

panels.title: Token Usage Over Time by Type

targets.expr:
(
  (sum by(user_id) (increase(claude_code_token_usage{type="input",model="claude-opus-4-6"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 5 or sum by(user_id) (claude_code_token_usage{type="input",model="claude-opus-4-6"}) * 0)
  + (sum by(user_id) (increase(claude_code_token_usage{type="output",model="claude-opus-4-6"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 25 or sum by(user_id) (claude_code_token_usage{type="output",model="claude-opus-4-6"}) * 0)
  + (sum by(user_id) (increase(claude_code_token_usage{type="input",model="claude-sonnet-4-6"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 3 or sum by(user_id) (claude_code_token_usage{type="input",model="claude-sonnet-4-6"}) * 0)
  + (sum by(user_id) (increase(claude_code_token_usage{type="output",model="claude-sonnet-4-6"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 15 or sum by(user_id) (claude_code_token_usage{type="output",model="claude-sonnet-4-6"}) * 0)
  + (sum by(user_id) (increase(claude_code_token_usage{type="input",model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 1 or sum by(user_id) (claude_code_token_usage{type="input",model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"}) * 0)
  + (sum by(user_id) (increase(claude_code_token_usage{type="output",model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 5 or sum by(user_id) (claude_code_token_usage{type="output",model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"}) * 0)
) * $bedrock_region_multiplier

(
  sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-opus-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="input"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 5
  + sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-opus-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="output"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 25
  + (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-opus-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheRead"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 0.5 or vector(0))
  + (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-opus-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheCreation"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 6.25 or vector(0))
) * $bedrock_region_multiplier

(
  sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-sonnet-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="input"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 3
  + sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-sonnet-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="output"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 15
  + (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-sonnet-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheRead"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 0.3 or vector(0))
  + (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-sonnet-4-6", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheCreation"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 3.75 or vector(0))
) * $bedrock_region_multiplier

(
  sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", user_id=~"$user_id", type="input"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 1
  + sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", user_id=~"$user_id", type="output"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 5
  + (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheRead"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 0.1 or vector(0))
  + (sum(increase(claude_code_token_usage{model="claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", user_id=~"$user_id", type="cacheCreation"}[$__range])) / 1e6 * 1.25 or vector(0))
) * $bedrock_region_multiplier

panels.title: Bedrock Pricing Reference
panels.description: Current Bedrock on-demand pricing used in this dashboard. Update these when Bedrock pricing changes.

options.content:
## Bedrock On-Demand Pricing (per 1M tokens)

| Model | Input | Output | Cache Write (1.25x) | Cache Read (0.1x) |
|-------|-------|--------|--------------------|-----------|
| **Opus 4.6** | $5.00 | $25.00 | $6.25 | $0.50 |
| **Opus 4** | $15.00 | $75.00 | $18.75 | $1.50 |
| **Sonnet 4.6** | $3.00 | $15.00 | $3.75 | $0.30 |
| **Sonnet 4** | $3.00 | $15.00 | $3.75 | $0.30 |
| **Haiku 4.5** | $1.00 | $5.00 | $1.25 | $0.10 |

**Regional endpoint multiplier:** select *Regional (+10%)* in the dashboard variable above to apply the 10% surcharge for Bedrock regional endpoints (applies to models 4.5+).

**Why not use `claude_code_cost_usage`?** That metric calculates cost using Anthropic's direct API pricing, which may differ from Bedrock pricing (especially for older model versions and regional endpoints). This dashboard computes cost from `claude_code_token_usage` (accurate token counts from the API response) multiplied by Bedrock rates, giving an estimate that matches your AWS bill.

**To update pricing:** edit the PromQL constants in each panel, or use the recording rules in `mimir/bedrock-pricing-rules.yml`.
